steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents including handtool rack rails and mounting screws.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents including handtool rack rails and mounting screws.

steps.title: Mount to Studs
steps.content: Position rack horizontally on trailer wall or garage wall studs. Drill self-tapping screws directly through slots into steel ribs/studs.

es.title: Mount to Studs
es.content: Position rack horizontally on trailer wall or garage wall studs. Drill self-tapping screws directly through slots into steel ribs/studs.

steps.title: Organize Tools
steps.content: Slide shovels, rakes, and brooms vertically into organizing slots. Use lock pins if necessary.

es.title: Organize Tools
es.content: Slide shovels, rakes, and brooms vertically into organizing slots. Use lock pins if necessary.
